testsuite.name: no.nav.pdfgen.PdfGenITest

testcase.name: Calls to unknown endpoints should respond with helpful information genpdf and genhtml$pdfgen_test()
Generate sample PDFs using test data$pdfgen_test()
Calls to unknown endpoints should respond with helpful information genpdf$pdfgen_test()
Using the HTML convert endpoint should render a document using default HTML$pdfgen_test()
Using the image convert endpoint Should render a document using input image$pdfgen_test()
